requirement_topic.en: Mandatory Energy Efficiency Labelling — Secretaría de Energía Scheme
requirement_topic.zh: 强制能效标识——能源秘书处方案
requirement_topic.zht: 強制能效標識——能源秘書處方案

summary.en: Argentina mandates energy efficiency labelling for industrial motors through a scheme administered by the Secretaría de Energía. Efficiency classes are aligned to IEC 60034-30-1 IE codes via IRAM 62404. Motors must carry the mandatory energy efficiency label before being placed on the Argentine market. The labelling scheme requires the IE class to be declared and verified; importers must present conformity documentation to ARCA (formerly AFIP) at customs. The Secretaría de Energía may update minimum efficiency thresholds by resolution; current requirements should be verified against the latest official publications.
summary.zh: 阿根廷通过能源秘书处管理的方案对工业电机实施强制能效标识。效率等级通过IRAM 62404与IEC 60034-30-1 IE代码对齐。电机在投放阿根廷市场前须附有强制能效标识。该标识方案要求声明并核实IE等级；进口商须向ARCA（原AFIP）提交海关合规文件。能源秘书处可通过决议更新最低能效门槛；应对照最新官方出版物核实现行要求。
summary.zht: 阿根廷通過能源秘書處管理的方案對工業電機實施強制能效標識。效率等級通過IRAM 62404與IEC 60034-30-1 IE代碼對齊。電機在投放阿根廷市場前須附有強制能效標識。該標識方案要求聲明並核實IE等級；進口商須向ARCA（原AFIP）提交海關合規文件。能源秘書處可通過決議更新最低能效門檻；應對照最新官方出版物核實現行要求。

standards_or_laws: Secretaría de Energía — mandatory energy efficiency labelling resolutions for motors
ARCA (ex-AFIP) — import customs conformity documentation requirements

summary.en: China requires energy efficiency labelling under GB/T 28569-2012 for three-phase asynchronous motors, with GB 18613-2020 setting the mandatory efficiency grades. The labelling scheme is administered by SAMR. Grade 3 (IE3) is the mandatory minimum; Grade 2 (IE4) is the voluntary energy-saving evaluation level. Chinese energy efficiency labels follow a GB/T format that differs in layout and declaration requirements from the Argentine Secretaría de Energía labelling format.
summary.zh: 中国要求三相异步电机按GB/T 28569-2012进行能效标识，GB 18613-2020规定强制能效等级。标识方案由国家市场监督管理总局管理。3级（IE3）为法定最低，2级（IE4）为节能评价值（自愿）。中国能效标识遵循GB/T格式，与阿根廷能源秘书处标识格式在布局和声明要求上有所不同。
summary.zht: 中國要求三相異步電機按GB/T 28569-2012進行能效標識，GB 18613-2020規定強制能效等級。標識方案由國家市場監督管理總局管理。3級（IE3）為法定最低，2級（IE4）為節能評價值（自願）。中國能效標識遵循GB/T格式，與阿根廷能源秘書處標識格式在佈局和聲明要求上有所不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613-2020 (mandatory efficiency grades — Grade 3 = IE3 minimum)
GB/T 28569-2012 (energy efficiency labelling for three-phase asynchronous motors)

gap.en: Both Argentina and China mandate energy efficiency labelling, and both reference IE class codes aligned to IEC 60034-30-1. The gap lies in the certification and labelling process: Argentine market entry requires IRAM-scheme labelling verified by INTI or an IRAM-authorised body, plus ARCA customs documentation. Chinese GB/T 28569 labels are not directly accepted. The label format, declaration language, and conformity documentation package differ. Additionally, the Secretaría de Energía may set minimum IE thresholds by resolution that must be checked against current publications.
gap.zh: 阿根廷和中国均强制要求能效标识，且均参考与IEC 60034-30-1对齐的IE等级代码。差距在于认证和标识流程：进入阿根廷市场需要经INTI或IRAM授权机构核实的IRAM方案标识，以及ARCA海关文件。中国GB/T 28569标识不被直接接受。标识格式、声明语言和合规文件包均有所不同。此外，能源秘书处可能通过决议设定最低IE门槛，须核实最新出版物。
gap.zht: 阿根廷和中國均強制要求能效標識，且均參考與IEC 60034-30-1對齊的IE等級代碼。差距在於認證和標識流程：進入阿根廷市場需要經INTI或IRAM授權機構核實的IRAM方案標識，以及ARCA海關文件。中國GB/T 28569標識不被直接接受。標識格式、聲明語言和合規文件包均有所不同。此外，能源秘書處可能通過決議設定最低IE門檻，須核實最新出版物。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — energy efficiency labelling required before Argentine market placement; customs documentation required by ARCA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18613-2020 mandatory since June 2021; GB/T 28569 labelling required for domestic market

source.publisher: Secretaría de Energía — Gobierno de Argentina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors carrying GB/T 28569 energy efficiency labels cannot be placed on the Argentine market without obtaining IRAM-scheme labelling and the required ARCA customs conformity documentation. Exporters must verify the current minimum IE class threshold set by Secretaría de Energía resolutions and engage an IRAM-authorised body to certify compliance. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 持有GB/T 28569能效标识的中国电机，未获得IRAM方案标识及所需ARCA海关合规文件，不得进入阿根廷市场。出口商须核实能源秘书处决议设定的当前最低IE等级门槛，并委托IRAM授权机构认证合规性。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 持有GB/T 28569能效標識的中國電機，未獲得IRAM方案標識及所需ARCA海關合規文件，不得進入阿根廷市場。出口商須核實能源秘書處決議設定的當前最低IE等級門檻，並委託IRAM授權機構認證合規性。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。

requirement_topic.en: Minimum Efficiency Performance Standard (MEPS) — IE Class Floor
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效标准（MEPS）——IE等级底线
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效標準（MEPS）——IE等級底線

summary.en: Argentina's Secretaría de Energía administers minimum efficiency performance standards (MEPS) for motors aligned to IEC 60034-30-1 IE classes via IRAM 62404. The applicable minimum IE class is set by Secretaría de Energía resolutions and should be verified against current official publications, as thresholds can be updated by resolution. Motors below the mandated IE class floor cannot be imported or sold. INTI testing confirms whether a motor meets the required IE class before the mandatory label is affixed.
summary.zh: 阿根廷能源秘书处通过IRAM 62404管理与IEC 60034-30-1 IE等级对齐的电机最低能效标准（MEPS）。适用的最低IE等级由能源秘书处决议规定，须核实最新官方出版物，因门槛可通过决议更新。低于法定IE等级底线的电机不得进口或销售。INTI检测确认电机是否符合所需IE等级，然后才能贴附强制标识。
summary.zht: 阿根廷能源秘書處通過IRAM 62404管理與IEC 60034-30-1 IE等級對齊的電機最低能效標準（MEPS）。適用的最低IE等級由能源秘書處決議規定，須核實最新官方出版物，因門檻可通過決議更新。低於法定IE等級底線的電機不得進口或銷售。INTI檢測確認電機是否符合所需IE等級，然後才能貼附強制標識。

standards_or_laws: Secretaría de Energía resolutions on minimum motor efficiency (verify current resolution for applicable IE class floor)

summary.en: China's GB 18613-2020 mandates IE3 (Grade 3) as the minimum efficiency floor for most three-phase induction motors since 1 June 2021. Grade 2 (= IE4) is the voluntary energy-saving evaluation level. Motors below IE3 (Grade 3) may not be manufactured or sold in China. The efficiency floor concept is structurally similar to Argentina's MEPS approach, both referencing IEC 60034-30-1:2014 IE class definitions.
summary.zh: 中国GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起规定，大多数三相感应电机的最低能效底线为IE3（3级）。2级（= IE4）为节能评价值（自愿）。低于IE3（3级）的电机不得在中国生产或销售。能效底线概念在结构上与阿根廷MEPS方式相似，均参考IEC 60034-30-1:2014 IE等级定义。
summary.zht: 中國GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起規定，大多數三相感應電機的最低能效底線為IE3（3級）。2級（= IE4）為節能評價值（自願）。低於IE3（3級）的電機不得在中國生產或銷售。能效底線概念在結構上與阿根廷MEPS方式相似，均參考IEC 60034-30-1:2014 IE等級定義。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613-2020 (Grade 3 = IE3 mandatory minimum; Grade 2 = IE4 voluntary energy-saving level)

gap.en: Both China and Argentina impose a minimum IE class floor and both reference IEC 60034-30-1 definitions, reducing the conceptual gap. However, the Argentine MEPS threshold is set by Secretaría de Energía resolutions that may differ from the current Chinese GB 18613-2020 Grade 3 (IE3) floor, and the thresholds are subject to update. Additionally, meeting China's GB 18613-2020 Grade 3 does not automatically fulfil Argentine MEPS requirements — separate IRAM certification and INTI conformity assessment are required. Exporters must verify the current Argentine MEPS resolution before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国和阿根廷均设定最低IE等级底线，且均参考IEC 60034-30-1定义，概念差距较小。但阿根廷MEPS门槛由能源秘书处决议规定，可能与中国当前GB 18613-2020 3级（IE3）底线不同，且门槛可能更新。此外，满足中国GB 18613-2020 3级并不自动满足阿根廷MEPS要求——还需单独的IRAM认证和INTI合规评定。出口商在发货前须核实当前阿根廷MEPS决议。
gap.zht: 中國和阿根廷均設定最低IE等級底線，且均參考IEC 60034-30-1定義，概念差距較小。但阿根廷MEPS門檻由能源秘書處決議規定，可能與中國當前GB 18613-2020 3級（IE3）底線不同，且門檻可能更新。此外，滿足中國GB 18613-2020 3級並不自動滿足阿根廷MEPS要求——還需單獨的IRAM認證和INTI合規評定。出口商在發貨前須核實當前阿根廷MEPS決議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — minimum IE class set by Secretaría de Energía resolution; motors below the floor cannot be imported or sold in Argentina
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18613-2020 Grade 3 (IE3) is the mandatory minimum since June 2021

source.publisher: Secretaría de Energía — Eficiencia Energética, Gobierno de Argentina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors meeting GB 18613-2020 Grade 3 (IE3) may satisfy the IE floor conceptually, but Argentine market entry requires IRAM certification and INTI-verified conformity assessment. The current MEPS resolution threshold must be confirmed with the Secretaría de Energía. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 满足GB 18613-2020 3级（IE3）的中国电机在概念上可能符合IE底线，但进入阿根廷市场需要IRAM认证和INTI核实的合规评定。须向能源秘书处确认当前MEPS决议门槛。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 滿足GB 18613-2020 3級（IE3）的中國電機在概念上可能符合IE底線，但進入阿根廷市場需要IRAM認證和INTI核實的合規評定。須向能源秘書處確認當前MEPS決議門檻。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Compatibility — Voltage and Frequency (380/220 V, 50 Hz)
requirement_topic.zh: 电网兼容性——电压与频率（380/220 V，50 Hz）
requirement_topic.zht: 電網相容性——電壓與頻率（380/220 V，50 Hz）

summary.en: Argentina's three-phase industrial grid operates at 380 V (line-to-line) / 220 V (phase-to-neutral), 50 Hz, regulated by ENRE (Ente Nacional Regulador de la Electricidad). This is the same nominal voltage and frequency as the Chinese industrial grid. Motors designed and rated for 380 V 50 Hz operation in China are therefore grid-compatible with Argentina without voltage or frequency modification. ENRE enforces grid quality standards; motors connected to the ENRE-regulated grid must comply with applicable connection and quality requirements.
summary.zh: 阿根廷三相工业电网在ENRE（国家电力监管实体）监管下，运行于380 V（线对线）/ 220 V（相对中性）、50 Hz。这与中国工业电网的额定电压和频率相同。在中国按380 V 50 Hz设计和额定的电机，因此在电网兼容性上无需进行电压或频率改造即可适用于阿根廷。ENRE执行电网质量标准；接入ENRE监管电网的电机须符合适用的接入和质量要求。
summary.zht: 阿根廷三相工業電網在ENRE（國家電力監管實體）監管下，運行於380 V（線對線）/ 220 V（相對中性）、50 Hz。這與中國工業電網的額定電壓和頻率相同。在中國按380 V 50 Hz設計和額定的電機，因此在電網相容性上無需進行電壓或頻率改造即可適用於阿根廷。ENRE執行電網質量標準；接入ENRE監管電網的電機須符合適用的接入和質量要求。

standards_or_laws: ENRE — Ente Nacional Regulador de la Electricidad (grid quality and connection standards)
IEC 60034-1 (motor voltage and frequency tolerance ratings — adopted basis)

summary.en: China's industrial grid standard is 380 V (line-to-line) / 220 V (phase-to-neutral), 50 Hz — identical to Argentina. Standard Chinese three-phase induction motors are designed and rated for this voltage and frequency. GB 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1) governs ratings and performance including voltage and frequency tolerances. GB 12665 covers motor cooling requirements. No voltage or frequency conversion is needed when exporting 380 V 50 Hz motors from China to Argentina.
summary.zh: 中国工业电网标准为380 V（线对线）/ 220 V（相对中性）、50 Hz——与阿根廷完全相同。标准中国三相感应电机按此电压和频率设计和额定。GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）规范额定值和性能，包括电压和频率容差。GB 12665涵盖电机冷却要求。从中国出口380 V 50 Hz电机至阿根廷无需电压或频率转换。
summary.zht: 中國工業電網標準為380 V（線對線）/ 220 V（相對中性）、50 Hz——與阿根廷完全相同。標準中國三相感應電機按此電壓和頻率設計和額定。GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）規範額定值和性能，包括電壓和頻率容差。GB 12665涵蓋電機冷卻要求。從中國出口380 V 50 Hz電機至阿根廷無需電壓或頻率轉換。

standards_or_laws: GB 755-2019 (旋转电机 额定值和性能, equivalent to IEC 60034-1)

gap.en: No voltage or frequency gap exists between China and Argentina for standard three-phase industrial motors rated at 380 V 50 Hz. This is a significant advantage compared to exporting to markets with different voltage standards (e.g. 460 V 60 Hz North America). The main remaining compliance steps relate to IRAM certification, ENRE grid connection requirements, and energy efficiency labelling — not to electrical redesign. Exporters should still verify that nameplate voltage and frequency declarations match the Argentine grid specification and that any tolerance bands meet ENRE grid quality requirements.
gap.zh: 对于额定380 V 50 Hz的标准三相工业电机，中国与阿根廷之间不存在电压或频率差距。与出口到电压标准不同的市场（如460 V 60 Hz的北美）相比，这是一项显著优势。主要合规步骤仍涉及IRAM认证、ENRE电网接入要求和能效标识，而非电气重新设计。出口商仍应核实铭牌电压和频率声明是否与阿根廷电网规格匹配，并确保容差范围符合ENRE电网质量要求。
gap.zht: 對於額定380 V 50 Hz的標準三相工業電機，中國與阿根廷之間不存在電壓或頻率差距。與出口到電壓標準不同的市場（如460 V 60 Hz的北美）相比，這是一項顯著優勢。主要合規步驟仍涉及IRAM認證、ENRE電網接入要求和能效標識，而非電氣重新設計。出口商仍應核實銘牌電壓和頻率聲明是否與阿根廷電網規格匹配，並確保容差範圍符合ENRE電網質量要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory compliance with ENRE grid standards required; no voltage/frequency redesign needed for standard 380 V 50 Hz motors
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 755-2019 and grid code compliance required for domestic market; 380 V 50 Hz standard identical to Argentina

source.publisher: ENRE — Ente Nacional Regulador de la Electricidad

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard Chinese three-phase motors rated 380 V 50 Hz require no voltage or frequency modification for the Argentine market — this is a key advantage over many other export destinations. However, IRAM certification, INTI testing, ENRE grid connection compliance, and Secretaría de Energía energy efficiency labelling are still required. The absence of a voltage/frequency gap does not eliminate other regulatory obligations. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 额定380 V 50 Hz的标准中国三相电机无需为阿根廷市场进行电压或频率改造——这是相比许多其他出口目的地的重要优势。但仍需IRAM认证、INTI检测、ENRE电网接入合规及能源秘书处能效标识。电压/频率差距的缺失并不消除其他监管义务。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 額定380 V 50 Hz的標準中國三相電機無需為阿根廷市場進行電壓或頻率改造——這是相比許多其他出口目的地的重要優勢。但仍需IRAM認證、INTI檢測、ENRE電網接入合規及能源秘書處能效標識。電壓/頻率差距的缺失並不消除其他監管義務。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。
